task_completion.description: Place the required pneumatic components on the canvas.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an Air Source, an FRL Unit, a 3/2-Way Solenoid Valve (Spring Return), and a Single Acting Cylinder (Spring Return) placed on the EdrawMax canvas.

task_completion.description: Connect the components in the specified sequence.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for connecting lines showing a sequence from the Air Source to the FRL Unit, then to the 3/2-Way Solenoid Valve, and finally to the Single Acting Cylinder.

task_completion.description: Apply correct labels to the Air Source and FRL Unit.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the text 'Main Air (6 bar)' near or on the Air Source, and 'FRL-01' near or on the FRL Unit.

task_completion.description: Apply correct labels to the Valve and Cylinder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the text 'SOL-A' near or on the 3/2-Way Solenoid Valve, and 'Clamp Cyl' near or on the Single Acting Cylinder.

task_completion.description: Save the diagram as an EDDX file in the Documents folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the EdrawMax window title or a save dialog showing the file name 'pneumatic_clamp_circuit.eddx' in the '/home/ga/Documents/' directory.

task_completion.description: Export the diagram as a PNG image in the Documents folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an export dialog, a file manager window, or a terminal verifying the existence of 'pneumatic_clamp_circuit.png' in the '/home/ga/Documents/' directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the EdrawMax GUI to create the diagram.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the EdrawMax application interface is visible in the screenshots, rather than a text editor or terminal being used to write XML/EDDX code directly.

integrity.description: The agent used actual diagram components rather than drawing lines to fake them.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for standard pneumatic symbols from the application's library being dragged and dropped, rather than basic shapes (circles/rectangles) manually drawn to look like symbols.

integrity.description: The agent used the application's export feature to create the PNG.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for interaction with the 'Export' or 'Save As' menu in EdrawMax to generate the PNG, rather than using a screenshot tool or terminal command to fake the export.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output files are /home/ga/Documents/pneumatic_clamp_circuit.eddx and /home/ga/Documents/pneumatic_clamp_circuit.png. The diagram must contain pneumatic components (Source, FRL, Valve, Cylinder) and the following exact text labels: 'Main Air (6 bar)', 'FRL-01', 'SOL-A', and 'Clamp Cyl'.
